title: Founding AE
descriptionhtml:
28 Tage, 193 Meetings, €1.5M+ Pipeline, die aus allen Nähten platzt...


das war mein Sales-Februar. Neben investorengesprächen, Produkt roadmap und allem, was als Gründer sonst noch dazugehört.


Unser Founder-led Sales funktioniert. Allerdings erzeugt unsere Outbound-Maschine heute schon mehr Nachfrage, als wir im Follow-up sauber abbilden können.


Genau deshalb holen wir jetzt die ersten beiden starken Sales-Hires dazu.


Du kommst nicht in ein Callcenter-Setup, sondern in eine frühe Schlüsselrolle mit echtem Einfluss auf Sales, Produkt und Wachstum.

In einer Phase, in der aus Momentum ein System wird.


Compensation

Solides Fixum + 10% ungedeckelte Provision (sobald Closing mit übernommen wird)

Ich habe als Gründer zuletzt rund €25k/Woche geclosed, neben allem anderen. Das entspräche in unserem Modell schon heute grob ~€15k/Monat.


Mit vollem Fokus auf Sales sollte das für starke Leute eher die Benchmark als die Grenze sein.


Kennst du jemanden, der perfekt passt? Referral Bonus: €10k.


Kurz zu der Software:


Seit über 20 Jahren ist klar, dass dieser Markt massiv ineffizient ist.


Erst mit KI wird er zum ersten Mal wirklich softwareseitig angreifbar.


Jedes Jahr werden in Europa öffentliche Aufträge im Billionenbereich vergeben. Doch der Prozess sie zu gewinnen ist bis heute manuell, langsam und fehleranfällig.


Mit VOUND ändert sich das. Unsere Kunden gewinnen öffentliche Ausschreibungen in Minuten statt in Tagen.


Das ist kein Hot Take, sondern ein echter Painpoint. Mit genug Nachfrage, dass unsere Kalender regelmäßig voll laufen und wir die Outbound-Kampagnen abschalten müssen.


Kurz zu Uns:



  • Wir sind 3 Gründer + 1 Entwickler, extrem schnell, extrem nah am Kunden und tief im Produkt

  • In 3 Monaten sind wir ohne externes Funding auf 200k € ARR gewachsen.

    Jetzt bauen wir den nächsten Schritt: aus Founder-led Sales ein skalierbares System, mit dem wir auf €10M+ ARR wachsen


Aufgaben

Von Beginn an:


Du startest mit einer funktionierenden Demand Engine im Rücken: Wir sorgen anfangs dafür, dass dein Kalender voll ist.



  • Du führst die Erstgespräche, qualifizierst sauber, uncoverst echte Kaufgründe, behandelst Einwände früh und buchst den Folgetermin mit den richtigen Entscheider

  • Regelmäßige Sparrings mit mir als CEO, um den Sales-Prozess zu schärfen und SalesIQ (s.U.) gemeinsam weiterzuentwickeln

  • Direkte Feedback-Loops mit dem Team, damit deine Learnings in Produkt und Roadmap einfließen


**Das ist keine Rolle, in der du auf ewig dasselbe machst:

**Wenn du stark bist, übernimmst du Schritt für Schritt mehr: eigene Termine, Closing, Enterprise Sales und potenziell Team Lead.


Qualifikation

Du kommst in einer Phase dazu, in der aus einem funktionierenden Founder-led-Sales-System ein skalierbarer Sales-Aufbau wird.


Du passt gut, wenn du:



  • mindestens 1 Jahr (erfolgreiche) Erfahrung in Startup/tech-sales mitbringst

  • Verantwortung übernehmen willst

  • Lust auf ein Setup hast, das schon funktioniert, aber noch nicht fertig gebaut ist


Du solltest nicht jedes Wort gescriptet brauchen, sondern mitdenken, mitbauen und Lust haben, schnell mehr Ownership zu übernehmen.


Was heute schon da ist:



  • 80+ Kunden, darunter einige Top-Player der Branche

  • ein Outbound-System, das deinen Kalender auf Knopfdruck mit Terminen füllt

  • Buyer-Profile mit typischen Kaufgründen und Einwänden

  • SalesIQ: unsere interne Sales-KI, die wir selbst gebaut haben und laufend anhand der Sales-Bedürfnisse weiterentwickeln


Was du hier nicht bekommst:



  • Wort-für-Wort-Skripte

  • starre Prozesse

  • ein vollständig ausdefiniertes Sales-Handbuch (den Sales-Prozess entwickeln wir mit dir gemeinsam weiter)


Kennst du jemanden, der perfekt passt? Referral Bonus: €10k.

title: Founding AE
descriptionhtml:
Who We Are

Sapien is rethinking how finance teams operate in the age of AI. We’re building toward an autonomous CFO—systems that run company financials end-to-end. Our platform analyzes complex financial data in real time to increase decision cadence, prevent costly mistakes, and surface value. Sapien has caught multi-million-dollar errors, saved thousands of jobs, and returned significant dollars to customers’ bottom lines.

We partner with traditional businesses—manufacturing, healthcare, restaurants, and large enterprises—to deeply understand and automate their financial workflows. We’re HQ’d by Madison Square Park in NYC and backed by General Catalyst, Neo, and top operators from Google, OpenAI, Microsoft, Ramp, and Stripe (over $9M raised).

The Role

We're hiring our Founding AE to own deals end-to-end and help scale Sapien's revenue engine from the ground up. You'll run full-cycle sales from first conversation through close while helping shape our narrative, outbound strategy, and enterprise sales motion.

You'll work directly with the executive team to turn early traction into a repeatable, scalable sales motion. This means running discovery, demos, pilots, and negotiations, closing customers, and helping define how Sapien sells—from pricing and packaging to sales process and playbooks.

What You'll Do

Sales Execution

  • Own the full sales cycle from first meeting through close.
  • Run discovery, demos, pilots, and commercial conversations with finance and analytics leaders.
  • Manage pipeline and forecast revenue. You own deals and revenue outcomes.

GTM & Sales Motion

  • Help define Sapien’s sales process, pricing, packaging, and sales materials.
  • Partner with founders on positioning, messaging, and narrative.
  • Work with pipeline generation efforts (outbound, events, content) to ensure strong pipeline quality and conversion.

Customer & Market Insight

  • Develop deep expertise in finance and analytics workflows and the modern finance tech stack.
  • Feed structured market insight back to engineering, product, and leadership (what's resonating, objections, pricing feedback, and product gaps).
  • Help turn early customers into references, case studies, and expansion opportunities

How You Work (values We Care About)

  • AI-native. You’re energized by applying AI to transform how businesses run.
  • Ambiguity-shaping. You turn nebulous problems into a first pass and drive to resolution.
  • Extreme ownership. You identify what’s next—and do it. If you say it, it gets done.
  • Speed & hustle. You bias to action and move with urgency without sacrificing quality.

Compensation Range: $100K - $150K

description_html:
Who We Are

Sapien is rethinking how finance teams operate in the age of AI. We’re building toward an autonomous CFO—systems that run company financials end-to-end. Our platform analyzes complex financial data in real time to increase decision cadence, prevent costly mistakes, and surface value. Sapien has caught multi-million-dollar errors, saved thousands of jobs, and returned significant dollars to customers’ bottom lines.

We partner with traditional businesses—manufacturing, healthcare, restaurants, and large enterprises—to deeply understand and automate their financial workflows. We’re HQ’d by Madison Square Park in NYC and backed by General Catalyst, Neo, and top operators from Google, OpenAI, Microsoft, Ramp, and Stripe (over $9M raised).

The Role

We're hiring our Founding AE to own deals end-to-end and help scale Sapien's revenue engine from the ground up. You'll run full-cycle sales from first conversation through close while helping shape our narrative, outbound strategy, and enterprise sales motion.

You'll work directly with the executive team to turn early traction into a repeatable, scalable sales motion. This means running discovery, demos, pilots, and negotiations, closing customers, and helping define how Sapien sells—from pricing and packaging to sales process and playbooks.

What You'll Do

Sales Execution

  • Own the full sales cycle from first meeting through close.
  • Run discovery, demos, pilots, and commercial conversations with finance and analytics leaders.
  • Manage pipeline and forecast revenue. You own deals and revenue outcomes.

GTM & Sales Motion

  • Help define Sapien’s sales process, pricing, packaging, and sales materials.
  • Partner with founders on positioning, messaging, and narrative.
  • Work with pipeline generation efforts (outbound, events, content) to ensure strong pipeline quality and conversion.

Customer & Market Insight

  • Develop deep expertise in finance and analytics workflows and the modern finance tech stack.
  • Feed structured market insight back to engineering, product, and leadership (what's resonating, objections, pricing feedback, and product gaps).
  • Help turn early customers into references, case studies, and expansion opportunities

How You Work (values We Care About)

  • AI-native. You’re energized by applying AI to transform how businesses run.
  • Ambiguity-shaping. You turn nebulous problems into a first pass and drive to resolution.
  • Extreme ownership. You identify what’s next—and do it. If you say it, it gets done.
  • Speed & hustle. You bias to action and move with urgency without sacrificing quality.

Compensation Range: $100K - $150K
reason: The role involves full-cycle sales including negotiation and enterprise-level engagement, qualifying it as an enterprise sales position.

title: Founding AE
descriptionhtml:
Founding AE – Hypergrowth SaaS Start-up


Dublin | 5 days on-site | Equity included


We’re partnering with one of the fastest-growing SaaS start-up companies in Dublin right now. They're growing rapidly and are now looking to hire a Founding AE who wants to be part of something that is genuinely going to the moon.


This isn’t a role for someone who wants to sit in a big, structured sales org. It’s for someone who wants autonomy, ownership, and the chance to be part of a company that could become a real success story in the Dublin tech scene over the next few years.


The role

  • Own the full sales cycle from discovery through to close
  • Sell into mid-market customers across multiple industries
  • Work closely with the founders and leadership team
  • Help shape the sales process as the company scales
  • Take full ownership of pipeline and performance
  • Operate in a fast-moving, high-autonomy environment


What they’re looking for (essential)

  • 3–5 years of closing experience in a SaaS sales role
  • Currently or previously carrying a 7-figure annual quota
  • Ideally Start up/Scale up experience
  • Can commit to 5 days on site in Dublin City Centre
  • Someone who is comfortable working in a fast-growth start-up
  • Self-sufficient, driven, and comfortable with ownership
  • High energy, ambitious, and wants to be part of a company that’s going places


Why this role stands out

  • Join early in what is expected to be a hypergrowth journey
  • Real autonomy – not a heavily micromanaged environment
  • Equity included as part of the package
  • Opportunity to grow with the company as it scales
  • Be part of a company that is aiming to become one of the standout start-ups in Dublin


Contact james.slein@adamantinehq.com for more information.

title: Founding Account Executive - NL | Remote | SaaS Sales | Tot 60K base + 60K commissie
descriptionhtml:
🏋️ ♀️ De rol:

Als Founding Account Executive ben jij verantwoordelijk voor het opbouwen van new business vanaf de basis binnen een snelgroeiende SaaS scale-up.

  • 100% new business: van prospecting tot closing
  • Focus op mid-market tot enterprise klanten binnen industrie (manufacturing, logistiek, contractors)
  • Deal sizes van €10K–€200K ARR (gemiddeld €30K–€40K)
  • Sales cycles van 6–12 maanden met meerdere stakeholders
  • Sterk consultative en relationship-driven salesproces
  • Directe impact op salesstrategie en go-to-market


🔍 Wat we zoeken:

  • 1–2 jaar ervaring als Account Executive (full-cycle) in SaaS
  • Ervaring als SDR
  • Sterk in outbound (cold calling, pipeline opbouwen)
  • Zelfstarter met een echte builder mentaliteit
  • In staat om zelfstandig deals van A tot Z te runnen
  • Energie, ownership en commerciële drive


⭐ Nice to have:

  • Netwerk in de industrie / manufacturing
  • Ervaring met SPICED of vergelijkbare salesmethodieken


🎯 Waarom?

  • Founding AE rol met maximale ownership en impact
  • Product met sterke product-market fit in een traditionele industrie
  • Nauwe samenwerking met founders
  • Hoog verdienpotentieel door uncapped commissie
  • Doorgroeimogelijkheid naar Head of Sales
  • Kans om een team te bouwen en internationale expansie vorm te geven


💰 Salaris:

tussen de €50.000 en €60.000 basis jaarsalaris

  • 16% uncapped commissie (on target commissie per jaar €40K–€60K)

title: Founding Account Executive | SaaS | Martech | AI | 60M Series A |
companyindustry: Software Development and IT System Custom Software Development
descriptionhtml:
Founding Account Executive, EMEA

📍 London (Hybrid)

💰 £160k–£220k OTE (50/50 split) + Equity


There are not many opportunities where you can join an AI company this early, build an entire region from scratch, and do it at a business that’s already scaling at an insane pace.

This is one of them.


An AI software company operating in the AI search / content visibility space is hiring its first commercial hires in Europe. They help brands improve how they appear inside tools like ChatGPT, Claude and Perplexity — a huge shift that’s changing how companies think about SEO, content and customer acquisition.


The growth is what really stands out:

  • Grew from ~$3M → ~$15M → nearly ~$20M ARR in a very short period
  • Targeting ~$60M ARR next
  • Team scaled from ~40 → 150 people YoY
  • Raised a major Series B from top-tier investors
  • Already generating meaningful European revenue without a local sales team
  • US sales team massively outperforming — majority of reps over target, multiple at 150-200%+


🏋️ What you’ll do

  • Be one of the first GTM hires in EMEA
  • Own the full sales cycle from outbound through close
  • Sell into Mid-Market and Enterprise companies
  • Typical buyers: CMOs, VP Marketing, senior commercial stakeholders
  • Build pipeline, close deals and help shape the EMEA GTM motion
  • Work directly with US leadership while operating with high autonomy
  • Help lay the foundations for the future EMEA team


🔍 What they’re looking for

  • 3-7 years of B2B SaaS closing experience
  • Strong hunter mentality and ability to self-source pipeline
  • Proven top performer (President’s Club / consistent overachievement)
  • Experience selling to senior stakeholders
  • Someone comfortable in fast-moving, early stage, high-growth environments
  • High ownership, strong communication and genuine builder mentality


Nice to have:

  • AI / Martech / SEO / data platform exposure
  • Startup or founding AE experience
  • Additional European languages


🚀 Why this is interesting

This is not joining a slow-moving enterprise business with layers of process already built.

It’s joining a company that already has serious momentum, in one of the hottest areas in AI right now, at the exact point they’re starting to scale internationally.

description_html:
Founding Account Executive, EMEA

📍 London (Hybrid)

💰 £160k–£220k OTE (50/50 split) + Equity


There are not many opportunities where you can join an AI company this early, build an entire region from scratch, and do it at a business that’s already scaling at an insane pace.

This is one of them.


An AI software company operating in the AI search / content visibility space is hiring its first commercial hires in Europe. They help brands improve how they appear inside tools like ChatGPT, Claude and Perplexity — a huge shift that’s changing how companies think about SEO, content and customer acquisition.


The growth is what really stands out:

  • Grew from ~$3M → ~$15M → nearly ~$20M ARR in a very short period
  • Targeting ~$60M ARR next
  • Team scaled from ~40 → 150 people YoY
  • Raised a major Series B from top-tier investors
  • Already generating meaningful European revenue without a local sales team
  • US sales team massively outperforming — majority of reps over target, multiple at 150-200%+


🏋️ What you’ll do

  • Be one of the first GTM hires in EMEA
  • Own the full sales cycle from outbound through close
  • Sell into Mid-Market and Enterprise companies
  • Typical buyers: CMOs, VP Marketing, senior commercial stakeholders
  • Build pipeline, close deals and help shape the EMEA GTM motion
  • Work directly with US leadership while operating with high autonomy
  • Help lay the foundations for the future EMEA team


🔍 What they’re looking for

  • 3-7 years of B2B SaaS closing experience
  • Strong hunter mentality and ability to self-source pipeline
  • Proven top performer (President’s Club / consistent overachievement)
  • Experience selling to senior stakeholders
  • Someone comfortable in fast-moving, early stage, high-growth environments
  • High ownership, strong communication and genuine builder mentality


Nice to have:

  • AI / Martech / SEO / data platform exposure
  • Startup or founding AE experience
  • Additional European languages


🚀 Why this is interesting

This is not joining a slow-moving enterprise business with layers of process already built.

It’s joining a company that already has serious momentum, in one of the hottest areas in AI right now, at the exact point they’re starting to scale internationally.


For the right person, this is the kind of role that can completely accelerate a career.
reason: This position involves handling full sales cycles targeting mid-market and enterprise clients, qualifying it as an enterprise role.

title: Founding GTM team, Account Executive
descriptionhtml:
Europe’s first full-stack AI financial services company 


We merge best-in-class financial technology; banking, payments, invoicing, accounting, payroll and tax with embedded expert advisory services. 


We are the force-multiplier. Our system continuously learns from our customers, which means every workflow becomes faster, more accurate and more automated over time saving our customers 100+ hours a year of time wasted on admin. 


Our team is made up of ambitious, unapologetically curious, slightly crazy ex-founders, veteran fintech operators, AI engineers, creatives and corporate finance experts from the big4. We’re serious about excellence, but we’re anything but boring: on weekends you might find us at techno parties, wine tastings, football matches or training new models for fun.


If you thrive in a high-commitment, high-reward culture and want the autonomy to deliver your best work, this will be the most exciting team you ever join.


Neno is backed by Firstminute Capital, Motive Partners and angels from Miro, Coinbase, Mollie, Juni, Deel, Navro, Copper, Wise & PayPal. 


The role


In the first 3 months of soft-launch we’re closing deals 10x our forecasted ACV and now onboarding a customer per day. We are looking for a Founding AE to source and close the deals that build and accelerate Neno's GTM machine. You’ve previously been a top performing SDR or AE in an early stage, high-growth environment. This is a high execution, full-cycle sales role: you know how to leverage sales intelligence tooling to source, prospect, qualify, demo, negotiate and close and you will do it across our beachhead market the Netherlands.


You will work directly with the CEO, one of the most competitive individuals you will ever work alongside. You’ll play a central role in proving out our go-to-market motion, refining our ICP and building the GTM playbook that will scale the team and the business into winning in our home market and expanding into new markets. You are not coming to inherit a process, you are coming to build one, bringing the hunger, grit and resilience with experience in accelerating commercial traction from 0 to 100. 


What this role is not


Your job is going to be everything but easy or straight-lined. You will be required to context switch, think for yourself, problem-solve and sometimes work more than the required hours to get high-priority deals over the line. Building a company like Neno is fun, and we celebrate the wins and learn from the losses and never repeat the same mistakes. This is what it takes to win. And we only want to win. 


What impact you will have


  • Early hire on the GTM team to shape a career trajectory where you define the ceiling. If you want to grow into a VP of Commercial or CCO? Great. Prove to us that you have what it takes. The role is yours for the taking. 
  • Close new business from Neno's core SME segments: companies with 10-100 employees with annual revenues of €500K-€20M+
  • Build and manage a self-sourced pipeline of a minimum of 50+ new SQO’s per month, 30 closed-won per quarter within the target ACV threshold of €20K+ 
  • Refine and document the sales playbook: discovery frameworks, demo scripts, objection handling, proposal templates
  • Partner with Marketing and Product to feed market intelligence back into our positioning and roadmap
  • Exceed monthly and quarterly pipeline quotas. 
  • Help hire and onboard the next wave of SDR’s after you close your first 50 customers which shouldn’t be hard. 
  • If reading the above makes you uncomfortable then you are probably not the right fit for Neno. 


Responsibilities


Pipeline Generation & Management

  • Own a self-sourced outbound motion targeting founder-led SMEs in the Netherlands
  • Manage a clean, accurate CRM pipeline with realistic close dates and clear next steps
  • Prioritise and qualify leads ruthlessly to protect your time and the team's resources
  • We will not hire SDRs until you have closed 50 deals. 


Sales Execution

  • Run consultative discovery calls that surface pain and build genuine business cases. 
  • Deliver compelling product demos tailored to the customer's workflow and pain points.
  • Navigate complex multi-stakeholder deals: from finance lead to CEO sign-off
  • Close deals at a target ACV of €20k-50K with full-stack adoption. 


AI-Native Selling

  • Use AI tools (e.g., Claude) daily for prospect research, personalised outreach, call preparation and follow-up drafting
  • Leverage our AI-powered product demo to show, not tell what Neno can do for a customer's business


Playbook & Process

  • Document what works and what doesn't, every quarter we get smarter about how we sell
  • Collaborate with Marketing on ICP validation, messaging and campaign feedback loops


What we're looking for


Experience

  • 3+ years in a highly executional SDR/AE role, ideally in high-growth SME B2B SaaS, FinTech or Accounting technology verticals. 
  • Proven track record in exceeding quota from multi-threading and SDR work to closing the deal and smashing the gong and poppin bottles. We learn from the losses and celebrate the wins. Always. 
  • Experience selling to SMEs is highly valued, sourcing and closing businesses of €500K - €20m ARR. 
  • Proficient Dutch language is a hard requirement. 


Skills

  • Outstanding discovery and needs-mapping skills, you listen more than you talk
  • Clear, confident communicator in written and verbal formats (Dutch & English) 
  • Comfortable navigating deal complexity: multi-stakeholder, multi-product, multi-currency
  • Proficient with Hubspot CRM and modern sales tooling (Clay, Instantly).  


Mindset

  • You never know what’s behind the next no. It’s often a yes. You keep persevering. 
  • You are a builder, you want to design the playbook, not follow someone else's. 
  • You take ownership of your target number and do not make excuses. 
  • You are resilient, coachable and genuinely energised and do not give up until the deal is closed. 


What we give you


💻 The latest equipment & software licenses to close ad many deals as humanly possible. 

🤠 An incredibly smart, hardworking and humble team that constantly supports your growth with a hybrid policy of 3 days a week in office. Most of us are 5 days a week. 

🏝 Work from anywhere in the world for 8 weeks a year within a 3-hour timezone

💸 A competitive salary, OTE with accelerators & stock options. 

🏝 25 days of annual leave 

🥳 Regular socials and company off-sites in questionably exotic destinations. 

🚀 A huge opportunity for career growth as you help shape a market-defining GTM team across Europe


What you're signing up for


Before applying for this role, carefully think about what you are committing to. The interview process is demanding for the very reason that we seek the top 1% of candidates. Building Neno means embarking on an exciting journey to reshape the future of AI-native financial services. The opportunity is massive and the road to get there is challenging. You will often have to step out of your comfort zone and willingly take on tasks outside your job spec.


Our Process


We review applications on a rolling basis. If you're a good fit, we move quickly. We'll schedule an initial conversation to discuss the role in more detail, followed by a team interview and final offer.


Screening interview

Cold call interview

Values interview

Offer 


*This role does not offer visa sponsorship

description_html:
Europe’s first full-stack AI financial services company 


We merge best-in-class financial technology; banking, payments, invoicing, accounting, payroll and tax with embedded expert advisory services. 


We are the force-multiplier. Our system continuously learns from our customers, which means every workflow becomes faster, more accurate and more automated over time saving our customers 100+ hours a year of time wasted on admin. 


Our team is made up of ambitious, unapologetically curious, slightly crazy ex-founders, veteran fintech operators, AI engineers, creatives and corporate finance experts from the big4. We’re serious about excellence, but we’re anything but boring: on weekends you might find us at techno parties, wine tastings, football matches or training new models for fun.


If you thrive in a high-commitment, high-reward culture and want the autonomy to deliver your best work, this will be the most exciting team you ever join.


Neno is backed by Firstminute Capital, Motive Partners and angels from Miro, Coinbase, Mollie, Juni, Deel, Navro, Copper, Wise & PayPal. 


The role


In the first 3 months of soft-launch we’re closing deals 10x our forecasted ACV and now onboarding a customer per day. We are looking for a Founding AE to source and close the deals that build and accelerate Neno's GTM machine. You’ve previously been a top performing SDR or AE in an early stage, high-growth environment. This is a high execution, full-cycle sales role: you know how to leverage sales intelligence tooling to source, prospect, qualify, demo, negotiate and close and you will do it across our beachhead market the Netherlands.


You will work directly with the CEO, one of the most competitive individuals you will ever work alongside. You’ll play a central role in proving out our go-to-market motion, refining our ICP and building the GTM playbook that will scale the team and the business into winning in our home market and expanding into new markets. You are not coming to inherit a process, you are coming to build one, bringing the hunger, grit and resilience with experience in accelerating commercial traction from 0 to 100. 


What this role is not


Your job is going to be everything but easy or straight-lined. You will be required to context switch, think for yourself, problem-solve and sometimes work more than the required hours to get high-priority deals over the line. Building a company like Neno is fun, and we celebrate the wins and learn from the losses and never repeat the same mistakes. This is what it takes to win. And we only want to win. 


What impact you will have


  • Early hire on the GTM team to shape a career trajectory where you define the ceiling. If you want to grow into a VP of Commercial or CCO? Great. Prove to us that you have what it takes. The role is yours for the taking. 
  • Close new business from Neno's core SME segments: companies with 10-100 employees with annual revenues of €500K-€20M+
  • Build and manage a self-sourced pipeline of a minimum of 50+ new SQO’s per month, 30 closed-won per quarter within the target ACV threshold of €20K+ 
  • Refine and document the sales playbook: discovery frameworks, demo scripts, objection handling, proposal templates
  • Partner with Marketing and Product to feed market intelligence back into our positioning and roadmap
  • Exceed monthly and quarterly pipeline quotas. 
  • Help hire and onboard the next wave of SDR’s after you close your first 50 customers which shouldn’t be hard. 
  • If reading the above makes you uncomfortable then you are probably not the right fit for Neno. 


Responsibilities


Pipeline Generation & Management

  • Own a self-sourced outbound motion targeting founder-led SMEs in the Netherlands
  • Manage a clean, accurate CRM pipeline with realistic close dates and clear next steps
  • Prioritise and qualify leads ruthlessly to protect your time and the team's resources
  • We will not hire SDRs until you have closed 50 deals. 


Sales Execution

  • Run consultative discovery calls that surface pain and build genuine business cases. 
  • Deliver compelling product demos tailored to the customer's workflow and pain points.
  • Navigate complex multi-stakeholder deals: from finance lead to CEO sign-off
  • Close deals at a target ACV of €20k-50K with full-stack adoption. 


AI-Native Selling

  • Use AI tools (e.g., Claude) daily for prospect research, personalised outreach, call preparation and follow-up drafting
  • Leverage our AI-powered product demo to show, not tell what Neno can do for a customer's business


Playbook & Process

  • Document what works and what doesn't, every quarter we get smarter about how we sell
  • Collaborate with Marketing on ICP validation, messaging and campaign feedback loops


What we're looking for


Experience

  • 3+ years in a highly executional SDR/AE role, ideally in high-growth SME B2B SaaS, FinTech or Accounting technology verticals. 
  • Proven track record in exceeding quota from multi-threading and SDR work to closing the deal and smashing the gong and poppin bottles. We learn from the losses and celebrate the wins. Always. 
  • Experience selling to SMEs is highly valued, sourcing and closing businesses of €500K - €20m ARR. 
  • Proficient Dutch language is a hard requirement. 


Skills

  • Outstanding discovery and needs-mapping skills, you listen more than you talk
  • Clear, confident communicator in written and verbal formats (Dutch & English) 
  • Comfortable navigating deal complexity: multi-stakeholder, multi-product, multi-currency
  • Proficient with Hubspot CRM and modern sales tooling (Clay, Instantly).  


Mindset

  • You never know what’s behind the next no. It’s often a yes. You keep persevering. 
  • You are a builder, you want to design the playbook, not follow someone else's. 
  • You take ownership of your target number and do not make excuses. 
  • You are resilient, coachable and genuinely energised and do not give up until the deal is closed. 


What we give you


💻 The latest equipment & software licenses to close ad many deals as humanly possible. 

🤠 An incredibly smart, hardworking and humble team that constantly supports your growth with a hybrid policy of 3 days a week in office. Most of us are 5 days a week. 

🏝 Work from anywhere in the world for 8 weeks a year within a 3-hour timezone

💸 A competitive salary, OTE with accelerators & stock options. 

🏝 25 days of annual leave 

🥳 Regular socials and company off-sites in questionably exotic destinations. 

🚀 A huge opportunity for career growth as you help shape a market-defining GTM team across Europe


What you're signing up for


Before applying for this role, carefully think about what you are committing to. The interview process is demanding for the very reason that we seek the top 1% of candidates. Building Neno means embarking on an exciting journey to reshape the future of AI-native financial services. The opportunity is massive and the road to get there is challenging. You will often have to step out of your comfort zone and willingly take on tasks outside your job spec.


Our Process


We review applications on a rolling basis. If you're a good fit, we move quickly. We'll schedule an initial conversation to discuss the role in more detail, followed by a team interview and final offer.


Screening interview

Cold call interview

Values interview

Offer 


*This role does not offer visa sponsorship
reason: The position entails closing deals and establishing go-to-market strategies, hallmarks of an enterprise sales role.

title: Founding Account Executive
descriptionhtml:
Founding Account Executive | Early-Stage Digital Health | UK


An exceptional opportunity to join a high-growth digital health startup at launch stage as its first commercial hire, owning early revenue and helping shape the commercial engine from day one.

The platform goes live in just a few weeks, early pilot customers are already delivering excellent feedback, and the business is now hiring its Founding AE to drive customer acquisition, build strategic partnerships, and create the foundations for scalable growth.


Founded by an internationally recognised doctor with a social audience of 5M+, the company has the credibility, visibility, and momentum to scale quickly.


Launching first through B2B partnerships in the employee wellbeing space, the long-term vision is to build a major B2C digital health platform — making this a rare opportunity for a commercially driven seller to make a real impact at the earliest stage.


We’re looking for someone who has:

  • Experience selling a software platform, SaaS product, or app in an early-stage environment
  • A background in employee benefits, wellbeing, digital health, or HealthTech
  • Strong outbound sales and pipeline-building capability
  • The ability to build relationships, close early customers, and create repeatable sales processes
  • A hands-on mindset suited to a fast-moving startup environment
  • The ambition to grow with the business and help build the future commercial team


Why join?

  • Be the first sales hire in a business with strong early traction
  • Take ownership of revenue generation at launch stage
  • Help define the sales motion, messaging, and customer acquisition strategy
  • Work directly with a high-profile founder
  • Build something with huge long-term potential, with significant scope for career growth as the company scales

title: Founding Account Executive | Factorial IT - Spanish Market
descriptionhtml:
Hello! 👋

At Factorial, we’re expanding our platform beyond HR and Finance to include IT, Cloud, and Device Management — creating the first truly connected people and IT management experience. We’re looking for Founding Account Executives to join the early sales team for Factorial IT, help define our go-to-market approach, and close the first deals that will shape this new business line.

The Role 🚀

As a Founding AE, you’ll own the full sales cycle — from discovery to close — for Factorial IT.

You’ll speak with IT Managers, CIOs, and Operations leaders to understand how they manage their people, devices, and SaaS tools today, and show them how Factorial can unify it all in one platform.

Depending on your profile and career goals, you’ll focus either on:

  • New Business (new logos) — acquiring new customers, or
  • Customer Expansion (existing customers) — upselling Factorial HR clients.

Why This Role Is Special 🌟

This is a founding role in a new vertical inside Factorial.

You’ll not only close deals but help define our playbook, sales narrative, and customer experience for Factorial IT.

Your success will directly shape how we grow this business across Europe.

What You’ll Do 🧠

  • Manage the full sales cycle from qualified lead to close.
  • Run discovery sessions, product demos, and solution presentations.
  • Build consultative relationships with IT and Ops decision-makers.
  • Collaborate closely with SDRs and Marketing to refine ICP and messaging.
  • Track and forecast opportunities accurately in HubSpot CRM.
  • Share insights from customers to improve product and process.

Your Profile 🧐

  • 1–3 years of experience in B2B SaaS sales (preferably in IT, Cloud, or Operations).
  • Native or bilingual in Spanish with professional English. French, or German are a plus.
  • Strong consultative selling and discovery skills.
  • Organized, analytical, and comfortable managing pipeline and forecasts.
  • Excellent communicator with a passion for technology.
  • Entrepreneurial mindset — excited to build, test, and iterate.

Bonus Points ✨

  • Experience selling to IT personas (CIO, IT Manager, VP Engineering).
  • Background in ITSM, MDM, or SaaS automation solutions.
  • Experience with upselling/cross-selling in existing customer bases.

About Us 🚀

At Factorial, we’re building the leading business management software for companies of all sizes. Our platform centralizes key workflows across HR, finance, and operations, freeing teams from manual processes so they can focus on what really matters: leading, growing, and taking care of their people.With over 1,200 employees across 7 markets, we serve 700,000+ users and are one of Europe’s fastest-growing SaaS companies, backed by top-tier investors and proudly headquartered in Barcelona.We believe in bold goals, radical ownership, and inclusive collaboration. If you're excited to shape the future of business management technology, we’d love to meet you.

Our Values 🫀

  • We own it: We take responsibility for every project. We make decisions, not excuses.
  • We learn and teach: We're dedicated to learning something new every day and, above all, share it.
  • We partner: Every decision is a team decision. We trust each other.
  • We grow fast: We act fast. We think that the worst mistake is not learning from them.
  • We believe in diverse talent: We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and strongly encourage people of diverse experiences and identities to apply.
  • We believe in inclusion: We are committed to equal opportunities and actively promote workplace inclusion of people with disabilities. If you would like to learn more about our inclusive recruitment processes, you are welcome to indicate so optionally and we will share additional information with you.

Wanna learn more about us? Check our website!

Perks of being part of our team 💆

We care about people and we also offer a lot of benefits for employees:

  • High growth, multicultural and friendly environment 🫱🏽‍🫲🏿
  • Alan private health insurance 🩺
  • Healthy life with Wellhub (Gyms, pools, outdoor classes) 🤸🏻‍♂️
  • Save expenses with Cobee 💸
  • Language classes 🧑🏼‍🏫
  • Breakfast in the office and organic fruit 🍏
  • Nora discounts 🍱
  • Free caffeine and theine ☕️
  • Pet Friendly 🐶

description_html:
Hello! 👋

At Factorial, we’re expanding our platform beyond HR and Finance to include IT, Cloud, and Device Management — creating the first truly connected people and IT management experience. We’re looking for Founding Account Executives to join the early sales team for Factorial IT, help define our go-to-market approach, and close the first deals that will shape this new business line.

The Role 🚀

As a Founding AE, you’ll own the full sales cycle — from discovery to close — for Factorial IT.

You’ll speak with IT Managers, CIOs, and Operations leaders to understand how they manage their people, devices, and SaaS tools today, and show them how Factorial can unify it all in one platform.

Depending on your profile and career goals, you’ll focus either on:

  • New Business (new logos) — acquiring new customers, or
  • Customer Expansion (existing customers) — upselling Factorial HR clients.

Why This Role Is Special 🌟

This is a founding role in a new vertical inside Factorial.

You’ll not only close deals but help define our playbook, sales narrative, and customer experience for Factorial IT.

Your success will directly shape how we grow this business across Europe.

What You’ll Do 🧠

  • Manage the full sales cycle from qualified lead to close.
  • Run discovery sessions, product demos, and solution presentations.
  • Build consultative relationships with IT and Ops decision-makers.
  • Collaborate closely with SDRs and Marketing to refine ICP and messaging.
  • Track and forecast opportunities accurately in HubSpot CRM.
  • Share insights from customers to improve product and process.

Your Profile 🧐

  • 1–3 years of experience in B2B SaaS sales (preferably in IT, Cloud, or Operations).
  • Native or bilingual in Spanish with professional English. French, or German are a plus.
  • Strong consultative selling and discovery skills.
  • Organized, analytical, and comfortable managing pipeline and forecasts.
  • Excellent communicator with a passion for technology.
  • Entrepreneurial mindset — excited to build, test, and iterate.

Bonus Points ✨

  • Experience selling to IT personas (CIO, IT Manager, VP Engineering).
  • Background in ITSM, MDM, or SaaS automation solutions.
  • Experience with upselling/cross-selling in existing customer bases.

About Us 🚀

At Factorial, we’re building the leading business management software for companies of all sizes. Our platform centralizes key workflows across HR, finance, and operations, freeing teams from manual processes so they can focus on what really matters: leading, growing, and taking care of their people.With over 1,200 employees across 7 markets, we serve 700,000+ users and are one of Europe’s fastest-growing SaaS companies, backed by top-tier investors and proudly headquartered in Barcelona.We believe in bold goals, radical ownership, and inclusive collaboration. If you're excited to shape the future of business management technology, we’d love to meet you.

Our Values 🫀

  • We own it: We take responsibility for every project. We make decisions, not excuses.
  • We learn and teach: We're dedicated to learning something new every day and, above all, share it.
  • We partner: Every decision is a team decision. We trust each other.
  • We grow fast: We act fast. We think that the worst mistake is not learning from them.
  • We believe in diverse talent: We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and strongly encourage people of diverse experiences and identities to apply.
  • We believe in inclusion: We are committed to equal opportunities and actively promote workplace inclusion of people with disabilities. If you would like to learn more about our inclusive recruitment processes, you are welcome to indicate so optionally and we will share additional information with you.

Wanna learn more about us? Check our website!

Perks of being part of our team 💆

We care about people and we also offer a lot of benefits for employees:

  • High growth, multicultural and friendly environment 🫱🏽‍🫲🏿
  • Alan private health insurance 🩺
  • Healthy life with Wellhub (Gyms, pools, outdoor classes) 🤸🏻‍♂️
  • Save expenses with Cobee 💸
  • Language classes 🧑🏼‍🏫
  • Breakfast in the office and organic fruit 🍏
  • Nora discounts 🍱
  • Free caffeine and theine ☕️
  • Pet Friendly 🐶
reason: The job involves leading sales for a new vertical, requiring full sales cycle ownership and involvement in enterprise engagements.

title: Founding Account Executive (Embat One) - International Hunter
descriptionhtml:
What is Embat?


Embat is one of the fastest-growing startups in Europe, founded in 2021 to revolutionize how medium and large-sized enterprises manage their finances and cash flow in real-time. Our mission is to create the definitive financial operating system for companies, delivering 100x efficiency compared to legacy systems.


Backed by top-tier international investors like Creandum, Samaipata, 4Founders Capital, and VentureFriends, we recently closed a €15M Series A. We are a team of 80+ ambitious professionals building the future of corporate finance.


About EmbatOne


EmbatOne is our specialized unit focused on Next-Generation Financial Infrastructure. We are bridging the gap between corporate ledgers and global liquidity by building proprietary connectivity that bypasses traditional friction.


While the industry still relies on former protocols or complex Host-to-Host integrations that take months to deploy, EmbatOne offers a native integration layer. We enable companies to manage international accounts, execute global payments, and automate accounting through a "Direct Rail" approach. We deliver in 24 hours what traditionally takes months, providing a "TMS Lite" experience that is invisible, instant, and scalable.


What we are looking for?


We are looking for our first Founding AE for EmbatOne. This is a Zero-to-One mission for a high-performance hunter. You won't be managing a pre-existing flow; you will be the pioneer architect of our international market entry.


This role demands Full-Cycle Ownership. You will own the entire journey, from identifying the "pain" in complex financial structures to closing deals that redefine how companies move money. We are looking for a builder who thrives in a high-intensity, outbound-heavy environment.


What you’ll do?



  • End-to-End Hunting: You are the owner of your funnel. From the first cold touch to the final signature, you will navigate complex sales cycles involving CFOs and Group Treasurers.

  • High-Velocity Outbound: We believe in volume as a diagnostic tool. You will execute a high-intensity outbound strategy with a baseline of 100 calls per week.

  • Strategic Account Mastery: You will manage a "Golden List" of 500 pre-selected strategic accounts. These include Tech Scale-ups, Travel industry leaders with high-frequency FX needs, and international subsidiaries looking for frictionless connectivity.

  • Value-Based Infrastructure Selling: You will position our proprietary connectivity as the solution to the "connectivity tax" companies pay in time and fees. Your focus will be on accounts with high transactional volume, where our impact is exponential.

  • Strategic Intelligence: Work closely with the team to refine the go-to-market strategy, identifying market triggers that make our "24-hour deployment" an irresistible proposition.


Objectives



  • Market Validation: Secure a first wave of strategic "lighthouse" accounts within your first 6 months.

  • Pipeline Discipline: Build and maintain a robust pipeline through consistent, high-intensity outbound activity.

  • Transactional Growth: Drive revenue through a combination of platform fees and transactional volume (Payments/FX).


Who we’re looking for?




  • Experience: 2+ years in B2B sales, ideally as a top-performing SDR or Junior AE in a high-growth Fintech or SaaS environment.




  • The "Zero-to-One" Mindset: You don't need a playbook; you help write it. You are resilient, proactive, and energized by the challenge of outbound prospecting.




  • Languages: Native or near-native English is a must. You will be selling to international markets (UK, DACH, Nordics) and will use English as your primary professional language. A third European language is a significant plus.




  • Financial Literacy: A Bachelor’s degree in Finance or Economics is preferred. You should be comfortable discussing global payment rails (SWIFT, SEPA), treasury workflows, and ERP integrations.




  • High Standards: Attention to detail and the ability to structure complex financial solutions into simple, compelling narratives.




  • Grit & Resilience: You have a high tolerance for "No" and the persistence to find the "Yes."




  • Executive Presence: Ability to hold high-level conversations with financial stakeholders and build trust quickly.




  • Proactivity: You see a list of 500 accounts as a goldmine, not a task.




Why you’ll love this role



  • Founding AE Impact: Your fingerprints will be on the foundation of EmbatOne’s international success.

  • Strategic Exposure

  • Transactional Upside: Our incentive model is tied to the success and volume of your clients. Bringing in high-volume accounts offers an earning potential far beyond traditional fixed-SaaS commissions.


What comes with working at Embat?


We offer a platform that allows you to reach your professional and personal goals. We pride ourselves on working in an evolving and agile environment, with day-to-day interaction with every member of the team. No bureaucracy or hierarchy. We rather give you space to lead, build, collaborate and create value to our users.


Additionally, being an Embat(ier) also comes with the following benefits:



  • A competitive salary according to the project and responsibility.

  • Hybrid working setup & flexible schedule

  • Latest technology of your choice to do your impactful work with.

  • Access to private health insurance with Sanitas

  • Access to salary on demand, restaurant card, transport card, and kindergarden checks through Payflow

  • English Classes

  • Career progression - we are a small team with great ambitions.

  • An opportunity to work hand in hand with our founders who built their careers in Investment Banking at J.P. Morgan for more than a decade.

  • 360º development - through internal and external talks, sponsored conferences and many more to come.

  • Twice-yearly performance reviews

  • Team Buildings plans

  • Languages: Native or near-native English is a must. You will be selling to international markets (UK, DACH, Nordics) and will use English as your primary professional language. A third European language is a significant plus.




  • Financial Literacy: A Bachelor’s degree in Finance or Economics is preferred. You should be comfortable discussing global payment rails (SWIFT, SEPA), treasury workflows, and ERP integrations.




  • High Standards: Attention to detail and the ability to structure complex financial solutions into simple, compelling narratives.




  • Grit & Resilience: You have a high tolerance for "No" and the persistence to find the "Yes."




  • Executive Presence: Ability to hold high-level conversations with financial stakeholders and build trust quickly.




  • Proactivity: You see a list of 500 accounts as a goldmine, not a task.




Why you’ll love this role



  • Founding AE Impact: Your fingerprints will be on the foundation of EmbatOne’s international success.

  • Strategic Exposure

  • Transactional Upside: Our incentive model is tied to the success and volume of your clients. Bringing in high-volume accounts offers an earning potential far beyond traditional fixed-SaaS commissions.


What comes with working at Embat?


We offer a platform that allows you to reach your professional and personal goals. We pride ourselves on working in an evolving and agile environment, with day-to-day interaction with every member of the team. No bureaucracy or hierarchy. We rather give you space to lead, build, collaborate and create value to our users.


Additionally, being an Embat(ier) also comes with the following benefits:



  • A competitive salary according to the project and responsibility.

  • Hybrid working setup & flexible schedule

  • Latest technology of your choice to do your impactful work with.

  • Access to private health insurance with Sanitas

  • Access to salary on demand, restaurant card, transport card, and kindergarden checks through Payflow

  • English Classes

  • Career progression - we are a small team with great ambitions.

  • An opportunity to work hand in hand with our founders who built their careers in Investment Banking at J.P. Morgan for more than a decade.

  • 360º development - through internal and external talks, sponsored conferences and many more to come.

  • Twice-yearly performance reviews

  • Team Buildings plans
reason: This role requires hunting new accounts in the corporate finance space, which qualifies it for enterprise-level sales.

title: Founding Sales Lead
descriptionhtml:
Founding Sales Lead

Location: London hybrid ·

Contract: Full-time permanent

Reports to: Venture MD


Cera is Europe's largest HealthTech company — $500m in revenue, 10,000+ carers and nurses, 2.5 million patient visits a month. We've built the largest home healthcare dataset in Europe and used it to reduce hospitalisations by up to 70%, saving the NHS more than £1bn.

Now we're backing something new. One of the ventures in our portfolio is building an AI-powered platform that's already transforming how frontline workforces are managed. We have a suite of AI agents that are live, in production, growing 40% month on month with a pipeline of mid-to-enterprise deals.


We can't say much more here. What we can say: this is a first sales hire role, working directly with the MD of the venture, with the full backing and infrastructure of Cera behind it. You'll own the commercial engine end to end — first outreach to signed contract, positioning to pricing, CRM to forecast — and build the sales function around you.

This is a career maker. We're already hiring the next two commercial heads — you'll help pick them and set the standard they work to.


If that sounds like too many hats, this isn't for you. If it sounds like the role you've been waiting for, keep reading.


What you'll do:

  • Split the book with the Venture MD — take on as much as you can land
  • Run the full sales cycle: outbound, discovery, pilots, procurement, close
  • Build the playbook: messaging, pricing, objection handling, forecasting
  • Shape the product with engineering — you're the bridge from customer to dev
  • Design pilots that prove ROI, then convert them to contracts
  • Lay the foundation for a sales function others will join — then hire them


About You:

  • 5+ years in B2B SaaS sales, ideally health-tech, HR/recruitment tech, or workforce platforms
  • You have successful founding AE experience in a B2B startup, or top revenue maker in a B2B scale-up
  • You're a hunter — confident self-sourcing pipeline, not waiting for leads
  • You've built from nothing before, not just inherited a book
  • Strong on consultative selling, ROI storytelling, and navigating complex procurement
  • Comfortable in ambiguity, energised by ownership
  • Based in the UK with ability to be in London regularly


Desirable:

  • Sold into care providers, staffing or recruitment companies, or complex regulated environments
  • Selling AI features or products
  • You have been, worked closely with, or sold to recruitment or HR professionals


The UK's health sector is in a workforce crisis. We're fixing it. Come sell something that actually matters — backed by the company that's already changed how Britain does care.

title: Founding Enterprise Account Executive
descriptionhtml:
Empathy is transforming the way families navigate life’s most difficult times - from the loss of a loved one to other major life transitions. By combining technology with compassionate human care, we bring clarity, comfort, and peace of mind when it matters most.

We partner with leading employers, insurers and financial institutions to deliver meaningful, human-centric support at scale. Today, Empathy supports over 45 million people across North America.

Backed by top-tier investors including General Catalyst, Index Ventures, Adams Street, Aleph and Entreé Capital. we’ve raised over $160 million to date, including a $72 million Series C, to expand our impact and scale our mission worldwide.

About this role:

As Empathy's founding enterprise account executive in the UK, you'll drive our sales efforts in the region, building relationships with insurers, wealth managers and financial institutions to help them reimagine customer care at life's most difficult moments.

You'll own the full sales cycle from prospecting through close, consistently delivering new partnerships that establish Empathy as the partner of choice for bereavement support in UK financial services. You'll have the backing of a proven North American operation serving 45M+ policyholders and eight of the top ten US life insurers—giving you credibility from day one.

This is the sweet spot: you'll have the autonomy and impact of joining early with the resources, client success stories and support of an established platform. As our first AE in the UK, you'll also have significant input into how we position ourselves and a clear path to sales leadership as we scale.

This will be a hybrid role with 3 days a week in office with our team.



In this role you will:


  • Build and convert your pipeline - identify, qualify and close enterprise partnerships with insurers, wealth managers and private banks, consistently hitting and exceeding revenue targets
  • Own the full sales cycle - from strategic outreach and initial meetings through commercial negotiation and contract signature
  • Develop executive relationships - engage C-suite and senior decision-makers, becoming a trusted advisor on how Empathy transforms their customer experience and drives retention
  • Demonstrate commercial value - develop compelling business cases and ROI models that show measurable impact on customer engagement, NPS and asset retention
  • Contribute to UK positioning - share market insights and client feedback to help refine our messaging, proposition and approach for the UK market
  • Represent Empathy - attend industry events and build our brand presence across the UK wealth and insurance sectors
  • Share what's working - document successful approaches and help establish best practices as we build out the UK sales team



Requirements:


  • 5+ years in enterprise B2B sales within wealth management or insurance, with proven success owning complex sales cycles from prospecting through close
  • Consistent track record of over achieving quota — you've sourced and closed strategic deals with financial institutions, navigating long sales cycles and multiple stakeholders to get deals over the line
  • Deep sector knowledge — you understand the wealth or insurance landscape, customer journeys and commercial drivers in UK financial services
  • Executive presence without ego — you're equally comfortable presenting to a board, cold calling prospects, or adjusting your pitch based on what's working. You do whatever it takes to win.
  • Builder mindset — you're energised by testing and learning in a new market, comfortable with ambiguity and iteration, and motivated by results rather than title or process

title: Account Executive - Not For Profit
descriptionhtml:
Company Description

Join the team redefining how the world experiences design.

Hello, g'day, mabuhay, kia ora, 你好, hallo, vítejte!

Thanks for stopping by. We know job hunting can be a little time consuming and you're probably keen to find out what's on offer, so we'll get straight to the point.

Where And How You Can Work

The buzzing Canva London campus features several buildings around beautiful leafy Hoxton Square in Shoreditch. While our global headquarters is in Sydney, Australia, London is our HQ for Europe, with all kinds of teams based here, plus event spaces to gather our team and communities. You'll experience a warm welcome from our Vibe team at front of house, amazing home cooked food from our Head Chef and a variety of workspaces to hang out with your team mates or get solo work done. That said, we trust our Canvanauts to choose the balance that empowers them and their team to achieve their goals and so you have choice in where and how you work.

What You’ll Be Doing In This Role

At Canva, our Public Sector team is dedicated to supporting any team or organization that has a need to design at scale. We have seen success across different types of companies, including those in the Education Institutions, Governments, Not-for Profits and others.

Our Account Executives work closely with our customers to understand their specific goals and objectives and provide tailored solutions to meet their needs. Whether it's creating beautiful infographics to help communicate externally with your customers or better understand complex concepts or developing engaging social media content, our team has the expertise to help our customers succeed.

At The Moment, This Role Is Focused On

  • Owning the Full Sales Cycle: Identifying, targeting, and securing net new nonprofit customers by understanding their unique challenges and positioning Canva as the solution of choice.
  • Driving Growth Within Existing Accounts: Partner with existing nonprofit customers to uncover opportunities for deeper adoption, cross-functional implementation, and user expansion.
  • Building and Executing Strategic Plans: Develop and implement tailored strategies to achieve sales goals, drive logo acquisition, and maximise the value Canva delivers to nonprofits.
  • Creating Lasting Relationships: Engage with nonprofit leaders and decision-makers to establish trust and demonstrate Canva’s value as a long-term partner in their mission.
  • Understanding and Communicating Customer Needs: Conduct discovery sessions and deliver compelling value propositions tailored to nonprofit organisations, showcasing Canva’s ability to meet their goals.
  • Leveraging Data to Drive Success: Analyse account usage and engagement trends to identify growth opportunities and inform strategies for upsell and expansion.
  • Collaborating for Impact: Work closely with internal teams, including Customer Success, Product, and Marketing, to ensure seamless onboarding, support, and growth for your accounts.


You're Probably a Match If

  • You’re Sales-Driven with proven experience driving net new business and growing existing accounts, ideally within SaaS, technology, or nonprofit-focused industries.
  • You have an understanding of the Nonprofit Sector, with knowledge of nonprofit challenges, goals, and decision-making processes, with the ability to align Canva’s solutions to their needs.
  • You have consultative Sales Expertise, with strong discovery skills to uncover customer pain points and craft tailored solutions, presenting clear ROI and value.
  • You’re an excellent Communicatior, with the ability to convey complex ideas simply and effectively, tailoring messaging to diverse audiences, from end-users to C-suite leaders.
  • You’re a collaborator, and skilled at working in cross-functional environments and leveraging internal resources to support your sales strategy.
  • You bring strategic thinking to your work, you’re proficient in account planning and execution, with a focus on achieving long-term customer success and retention.
  • You’re Data-Literate, and comfortable using data to identify trends, measure success, and refine your approach for maximum impact.
  • You’re motivated and adaptable, a self-starter with a growth mindset, eager to learn and tackle challenges while maintaining a focus on delivering results.


About The Team

Our Sales and Success team support Canva Enterprise, with the mission to empower every organisation to design. Canva Enterprise lets organisations consolidate design, content production, and collaboration tools under one secure and centralised account. From whiteboards to docs, to presentations and our AI platform magic Studio, our Sales team work with all departments empowering them to create and collaborate at scale.

What's in it for you?

Achieving our crazy big goals motivates us to work hard - and we do - but you'll experience lots of moments of magic, connectivity and fun woven throughout life at Canva, too. We also offer a range of benefits to set you up for every success in and outside of work.

Here's a Taste Of What's On Offer

  • Equity packages - we want our success to be yours too
  • Inclusive parental leave policy that supports all parents & carers
  • An annual Vibe & Thrive allowance to support your wellbeing, social connection, office setup & more
  • Flexible leave options that empower you to be a force for good, take time to recharge and supports you personally


Check out lifeatcanva.com for more info.

Other Stuff To Know

We make hiring decisions based on your experience, skills and passion, as well as how you can enhance Canva and our culture. When you apply, please tell us the pronouns you use and any reasonable adjustments you may need during the interview process.

We celebrate all types of skills and backgrounds at Canva so even if you don’t feel like your skills quite match what’s listed above - we still want to hear from you!

Please note that interviews are conducted virtually.

description_html:
Company Description

Join the team redefining how the world experiences design.

Hello, g'day, mabuhay, kia ora, 你好, hallo, vítejte!

Thanks for stopping by. We know job hunting can be a little time consuming and you're probably keen to find out what's on offer, so we'll get straight to the point.

Where And How You Can Work

The buzzing Canva London campus features several buildings around beautiful leafy Hoxton Square in Shoreditch. While our global headquarters is in Sydney, Australia, London is our HQ for Europe, with all kinds of teams based here, plus event spaces to gather our team and communities. You'll experience a warm welcome from our Vibe team at front of house, amazing home cooked food from our Head Chef and a variety of workspaces to hang out with your team mates or get solo work done. That said, we trust our Canvanauts to choose the balance that empowers them and their team to achieve their goals and so you have choice in where and how you work.

What You’ll Be Doing In This Role

At Canva, our Public Sector team is dedicated to supporting any team or organization that has a need to design at scale. We have seen success across different types of companies, including those in the Education Institutions, Governments, Not-for Profits and others.

Our Account Executives work closely with our customers to understand their specific goals and objectives and provide tailored solutions to meet their needs. Whether it's creating beautiful infographics to help communicate externally with your customers or better understand complex concepts or developing engaging social media content, our team has the expertise to help our customers succeed.

At The Moment, This Role Is Focused On

  • Owning the Full Sales Cycle: Identifying, targeting, and securing net new nonprofit customers by understanding their unique challenges and positioning Canva as the solution of choice.
  • Driving Growth Within Existing Accounts: Partner with existing nonprofit customers to uncover opportunities for deeper adoption, cross-functional implementation, and user expansion.
  • Building and Executing Strategic Plans: Develop and implement tailored strategies to achieve sales goals, drive logo acquisition, and maximise the value Canva delivers to nonprofits.
  • Creating Lasting Relationships: Engage with nonprofit leaders and decision-makers to establish trust and demonstrate Canva’s value as a long-term partner in their mission.
  • Understanding and Communicating Customer Needs: Conduct discovery sessions and deliver compelling value propositions tailored to nonprofit organisations, showcasing Canva’s ability to meet their goals.
  • Leveraging Data to Drive Success: Analyse account usage and engagement trends to identify growth opportunities and inform strategies for upsell and expansion.
  • Collaborating for Impact: Work closely with internal teams, including Customer Success, Product, and Marketing, to ensure seamless onboarding, support, and growth for your accounts.


You're Probably a Match If

  • You’re Sales-Driven with proven experience driving net new business and growing existing accounts, ideally within SaaS, technology, or nonprofit-focused industries.
  • You have an understanding of the Nonprofit Sector, with knowledge of nonprofit challenges, goals, and decision-making processes, with the ability to align Canva’s solutions to their needs.
  • You have consultative Sales Expertise, with strong discovery skills to uncover customer pain points and craft tailored solutions, presenting clear ROI and value.
  • You’re an excellent Communicatior, with the ability to convey complex ideas simply and effectively, tailoring messaging to diverse audiences, from end-users to C-suite leaders.
  • You’re a collaborator, and skilled at working in cross-functional environments and leveraging internal resources to support your sales strategy.
  • You bring strategic thinking to your work, you’re proficient in account planning and execution, with a focus on achieving long-term customer success and retention.
  • You’re Data-Literate, and comfortable using data to identify trends, measure success, and refine your approach for maximum impact.
  • You’re motivated and adaptable, a self-starter with a growth mindset, eager to learn and tackle challenges while maintaining a focus on delivering results.


About The Team

Our Sales and Success team support Canva Enterprise, with the mission to empower every organisation to design. Canva Enterprise lets organisations consolidate design, content production, and collaboration tools under one secure and centralised account. From whiteboards to docs, to presentations and our AI platform magic Studio, our Sales team work with all departments empowering them to create and collaborate at scale.

What's in it for you?

Achieving our crazy big goals motivates us to work hard - and we do - but you'll experience lots of moments of magic, connectivity and fun woven throughout life at Canva, too. We also offer a range of benefits to set you up for every success in and outside of work.

Here's a Taste Of What's On Offer

  • Equity packages - we want our success to be yours too
  • Inclusive parental leave policy that supports all parents & carers
  • An annual Vibe & Thrive allowance to support your wellbeing, social connection, office setup & more
  • Flexible leave options that empower you to be a force for good, take time to recharge and supports you personally


Check out lifeatcanva.com for more info.

Other Stuff To Know

We make hiring decisions based on your experience, skills and passion, as well as how you can enhance Canva and our culture. When you apply, please tell us the pronouns you use and any reasonable adjustments you may need during the interview process.

We celebrate all types of skills and backgrounds at Canva so even if you don’t feel like your skills quite match what’s listed above - we still want to hear from you!

Please note that interviews are conducted virtually.

title: Account Executive (eCommerce)
descriptionhtml:
Gumtree is in hyper-growth mode, and we are looking for a gifted Account Executive to join our newly formed team. This is a high-impact opportunity where you will spearhead our For Sale vertical. You won't just be a cog in a machine; you’ll be the engine, responsible for acquiring and strategically managing a high-value portfolio of B2B clients - from major electronics retailers to furniture giants.

We don’t use scripts, and we aren’t a call center. We trust your authentic sales ability to unearth leads, hunt down prospects, and close deals. If you want to build your own brand within a household name while helping us become the #1 choice for B2B marketplace solutions, this is your launchpad.

Location: London Waterloo, hybrid working with 3 days in the office.

What’s in it for you?

  • Direct Impact & High Rewards: You are a key driver of our revenue and success, not just a number. Your performance will be recognised and rewarded with an uncapped commission structure designed for high achievers.
  • A Mission That Matters: Represent a trusted brand on a mission to make commerce safer, simpler, and more successful for millions of users across the UK.
  • Professional Development: We are committed to your growth. You'll find clear pathways for career progression in a rapidly growing company, with ongoing support and training.
  • A Collaborative & Energetic Culture: Join a team of ambitious, positive people who celebrate every win - both individual and collective. Work from our modern offices in Waterloo, surrounded by a brilliant and supportive team.
  • Autonomy and Trust: We give you the freedom and the tools to own your success. Develop your own strategy and sell in a way that is authentic to you.
  • Time off: 25 days annual leave, increasing to 30 as your length of service grows.
  • Parental Leave: Family is as important to us, as it is to you - Our Maternity policy has you covered 20 weeks on full pay, followed by SSP. Fathers 'to be' are covered for 2 weeks on full pay!
  • Financial Security: A market-leading 10% total pension contribution (6% from us, only 4% from you).

What We're Looking For:

  • A Proven Sales Performer: You have a demonstrable track record of exceeding targets in a high-volume, outbound B2B phone sales environment.
  • A True 360° Seller: You expertly manage the entire sales cycle, from prospecting leads to pitching, closing, and cultivating lasting client relationships.
  • Customer Centric: You put the customer first in all interactions, laser focused on providing the right product to suit their needs and grow their business.
  • An Expert Communicator: You build rapport effortlessly, possess a natural ability to understand customer needs, and can articulate value propositions clearly and persuasively.
  • A Highly Motivated Professional: You are a proactive self-starter with an intrinsic drive to succeed. Your mindset is focused on performance and achieving outstanding results.
  • A Collaborative Team Player: You thrive in a competitive environment and are driven by personal goals, but you also bring positive energy and understand that the entire team's success is paramount.

About Us

Gumtree is one of the UK’s most popular online classifieds platforms, connecting millions of people every month to buy, sell, and trade locally. We’re embarking on an exciting transformation to revolutionise this much-loved platform into a cutting-edge, modern marketplace. With a well-known brand and heritage, we’re evolving to provide seamless buying and selling experiences powered by innovative features like integrated shipping, payments, and a comprehensive B2C marketplace. This is your opportunity to join a dynamic team at the forefront of reshaping a household name for the digital age. Together, we’re redefining how communities connect and trade, building a platform that’s ready for the future.

Together, we’re redefining how communities connect and trade, building a platform that’s ready for the future.

description_html:
Gumtree is in hyper-growth mode, and we are looking for a gifted Account Executive to join our newly formed team. This is a high-impact opportunity where you will spearhead our For Sale vertical. You won't just be a cog in a machine; you’ll be the engine, responsible for acquiring and strategically managing a high-value portfolio of B2B clients - from major electronics retailers to furniture giants.

We don’t use scripts, and we aren’t a call center. We trust your authentic sales ability to unearth leads, hunt down prospects, and close deals. If you want to build your own brand within a household name while helping us become the #1 choice for B2B marketplace solutions, this is your launchpad.

Location: London Waterloo, hybrid working with 3 days in the office.

What’s in it for you?

  • Direct Impact & High Rewards: You are a key driver of our revenue and success, not just a number. Your performance will be recognised and rewarded with an uncapped commission structure designed for high achievers.
  • A Mission That Matters: Represent a trusted brand on a mission to make commerce safer, simpler, and more successful for millions of users across the UK.
  • Professional Development: We are committed to your growth. You'll find clear pathways for career progression in a rapidly growing company, with ongoing support and training.
  • A Collaborative & Energetic Culture: Join a team of ambitious, positive people who celebrate every win - both individual and collective. Work from our modern offices in Waterloo, surrounded by a brilliant and supportive team.
  • Autonomy and Trust: We give you the freedom and the tools to own your success. Develop your own strategy and sell in a way that is authentic to you.
  • Time off: 25 days annual leave, increasing to 30 as your length of service grows.
  • Parental Leave: Family is as important to us, as it is to you - Our Maternity policy has you covered 20 weeks on full pay, followed by SSP. Fathers 'to be' are covered for 2 weeks on full pay!
  • Financial Security: A market-leading 10% total pension contribution (6% from us, only 4% from you).

What We're Looking For:

  • A Proven Sales Performer: You have a demonstrable track record of exceeding targets in a high-volume, outbound B2B phone sales environment.
  • A True 360° Seller: You expertly manage the entire sales cycle, from prospecting leads to pitching, closing, and cultivating lasting client relationships.
  • Customer Centric: You put the customer first in all interactions, laser focused on providing the right product to suit their needs and grow their business.
  • An Expert Communicator: You build rapport effortlessly, possess a natural ability to understand customer needs, and can articulate value propositions clearly and persuasively.
  • A Highly Motivated Professional: You are a proactive self-starter with an intrinsic drive to succeed. Your mindset is focused on performance and achieving outstanding results.
  • A Collaborative Team Player: You thrive in a competitive environment and are driven by personal goals, but you also bring positive energy and understand that the entire team's success is paramount.

About Us

Gumtree is one of the UK’s most popular online classifieds platforms, connecting millions of people every month to buy, sell, and trade locally. We’re embarking on an exciting transformation to revolutionise this much-loved platform into a cutting-edge, modern marketplace. With a well-known brand and heritage, we’re evolving to provide seamless buying and selling experiences powered by innovative features like integrated shipping, payments, and a comprehensive B2C marketplace. This is your opportunity to join a dynamic team at the forefront of reshaping a household name for the digital age. Together, we’re redefining how communities connect and trade, building a platform that’s ready for the future.
